formInstance.inputDocument:
Dear Financial Planning Team,

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Benjamin Scott, and I am reaching out to request a consultation focused on estate planning. I am particularly interested in discussing the creation of a living will and managing property distribution. I am hoping to schedule this meeting on November 30, 2024, during the evening hours, ideally between 4:00 PM and 6:00 PM. Should you need to reach me for any further details, please feel free to contact me via email at ben.scott24@gmail.com. I look forward to your guidance on this matter and am eager to solidify my estate planning.

Thank you for your assistance.

Warm regards,

Benjamin Scott

goldAnswers.Additional Comments: Looking to discuss the creation of a living will and managing property distribution.
